sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try UP to see if player can move
result = action(['UP'])
print(f"Result: {last_action_result}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        print(f"Player after UP: boundary={n['boundary']}")
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
